title: Snowfall's Crystal Essentials
description: The essentials to Minecraft Crystal PVP.
body:
## Snowfall's Crystal Essentials

> A clean, optimized texture pack built specifically for Crystal PVP.

---

[![Available on CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available%20on-CurseForge-1f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=orange)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/snowfalls-crystal-essentials)

[![Available on Planet Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available%20on-Planet%20Minecraft-0d1b2a?style=for-the-badge&logo=pa&logoColor=orange)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/sloop-s-crystal-essentials-1-0-2d-crystals/)

---

### What this pack is made for
This pack is designed mainly for Crystal PVP and focuses on visibility, clean visuals, and reducing distractions during fights.

---

### Features
• Low Fire  
• Low Shield  
• Small Totem  
• Small Totem Pop  
• No Explosion Particles  
• 3D Crystals  
• Ore Borders  
• Clear Particles  
• Clear Water  
• Shorter Grass  
• Darker Anchors  
And more!

---

### Why use this pack?
• Regular updates  
• Less visual clutter  
• Made for CPVP  

---

## Support
Found a bug in the pack or have a suggestion?  
Message me on Discord: @snowyfalling
